# Flip Words
Inline word swaps that preserve layout while cycling through a set.
## Import
```tsx
import { FlipWords } from "@/components/ui/flip-words";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<FlipWords words="fluid" duration="2500s" value={undefined} direction={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **words** (string) — default: `"fluid"`: Words
- **duration** (number) — default: `2500`: Duration
- **value** (number): Value
- **direction** (string): Direction
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add flip-words
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/flip-words
```
